testcase.name: test_03_poll_notifications
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notification_system.py:84: in test_03_poll_notifications assert response.status_code == 200, f"Poll notifications failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Poll notifications failed: {"detail":"Admin access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_06_mark_all_notifications_read
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notification_system.py:119: in test_06_mark_all_notifications_read assert response.status_code == 200, f"Mark all read failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Mark all read failed: {"detail":"Admin access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
